# python-bibtexparser

Vendored from `sciunto-org/python-bibtexparser` for Tremotino's native bibliography import and MCP bibliography tools.

Tremotino uses this package directly from `mcp/tremotino_mcp.py` when importing BibTeX content through MCP. The SwiftUI app also imports BibTeX into the same native Markdown bibliography object format, so app and agent workflows share one storage model.

Upstream: https://github.com/sciunto-org/python-bibtexparser
License: MIT, see `LICENSE`.
